title: Medication
description: A concomitant or study medication. Maps to SDTM domain CM (Concomitant Medications) or EX (Exposure).

med_id.description: Unique identifier for the medication record.

visit_id.description: Foreign key to the Visit at which medication was recorded.

med_sequence.description: Sequence number per subject. CDISC CM variable: CMSEQ.

medication_name.description: Name of the medication. CDISC CM variable: CMTRT.

dose.description: Dose amount. CDISC CM variable: CMDOSTXT.

dose_unit.description: Dose unit. CDISC CM variable: CMDOSU.

route.description: Route of administration. CDISC CM variable: CMROUTE.

frequency.description: Dosing frequency. CDISC CM variable: CMFREQ.

indication.description: Reason for medication. CDISC CM variable: CMINDC.

start_date.description: Medication start date. CDISC CM variable: CMSTDTC.

end_date.description: Medication end date. CDISC CM variable: CMENDTC.

is_ongoing.description: Whether the medication is currently ongoing.
